name: life-101
description: Peter McWilliams' 'Life 101: Everything We Wish We Had Learned About Life in School — But Didn't' — a gentle, humorous, and profound guide to life's fundamental lessons: learning, doing, enjoying, forgiving, following your heart, and living with joy. Packed with quotes, analogies, and practical wisdom from a smorgasbord of life's teachers.
useCase: Finding practical wisdom for living a joyful life, learning to forgive yourself and others, understanding life's purpose through metaphors, and discovering the tools for being a successful and happy human being.
knownRisks: Published in the 1990s — some references may feel dated
Quirky, aphoristic style may not appeal to all readers
Not a systematic philosophy — more of a collection of observations
Some New Age concepts (Law of Attraction) lack scientific backing
